case_title: CONSUELO OROZCO ET AL VS. NORA CALDERON

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY OROZCO, CONSUELO SANCHEZ, JOSE LUIS REY AS TO DEFENDANT CALDERON, NORA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-26-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OROZCO, CONSUELO SANCHEZ, JOSE LUIS REY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALDERON, NORA $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,000.00, NO COSTS; IFP WAIVER GRANTED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF NOV-17-2016 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO DEC-01-2016 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY JUDGMENT CREDITORS CONSUELO OROZCO AND JOSE SANCHEZ. APPEARANCE BY JUDGMENT DEBTOR NORA CALDERON. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF APR-13-2017 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO APR-27-2017 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR INFORMS THE COURT THAT SHE WAS MISTAKEN RECARDIGN FINAL PAYMENT AND THAT SHE DOES OWE THE JUDGMENT CREDITORS A FINAL PAYMENT OF $250.00. PARTIES AGREE TO CONTINUE THE HEARING DATE FOR THE FINAL PAYMENT OF $250.00 TO BE PAID BY MONEY ORDER IN COURT. JUDGEMENT CREDITORS JOSE LUIS REY SANCHEZ AND CONSUELO OROZCO ARE PRESENT. ASSISTED BY KARINA MCMILLIAN-REA, SPANISH CERTIFIED COURT INTERPRETER. JUDGMENT DEBTOR NORA CALDERON IS PRESENT. ASSISTED BY CARLA CUEVA, SPANISH CERTIFIED COURT INTERPRETER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00<WAIVER>) SERVED JAN-19-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CALDERON, NORA

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF AUG-29-2016 IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO SEP-12-2016 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 IN ORDER TO CONFIRM THAT JUDGMENT DEBTOR NORA CALDERON IS IN COMPLIANCE WITH THE NEW PAYMENT ARRANGEMENT. APPEARANCES BY CREDITORS CONSUELO OROZCO & JOSE LUIS REY SANCHEZ, AND DEBTOR NORA CALDERON. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH SPEAKING INTERPRETER DESIREE MILLIKAN ASSISTED MS. ORAZCO AT THIS MORNING'S HEARING. ON 5/26/16 THE PARTIES CAME TO AN ACCORD WHEREIN DEBTOR WAS TO PAY CREDITORS 1/2 OF THE JUDGMENT ON 6/20/16 & 1/2 OF THE JUDGMENT ON 7/20/16. TO DATE, DEBTOR HAS NOT MADE ANY PAYMENTS ON THE JUDGMENT. AT TODAY'S PROCEEDINGS DEBTOR AGREED TO PAY CREDITORS SEVEN HUNDRED ($700.00) DOLLARS EVERY TWO WEEKS UNTIL THE BALANCE OF $3,000.00 IS PAID IN FULL. A SPANISH SPEAKING INTERPRETER SHALL BE PROVIDED TO CONSUELO OROZCO TO ASSIST HER AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF SEP-12-2016 IS CONTINUED TO OCT-13-2016 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 FOR PROGRESS REPORT. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFFS CONSUELO OROZCO & JOSE LUIS REY SANCHEZ, AND DEFENDANT NORA CALDERON. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH SPEAKING INTERPRETER DANIEL NAVARRO ASSISTED THE PARTIES AT TODAY'S HEARING. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. AT THE 10/13/16 CALLING OF THE CASE, THE COURT SHALL CONTINUE THE MATTER FOR ANOTHER MONTH FOR PROGRESS REPORT, AND CONTINUE EACH MONTH THEREAFTER FOR PROGRESS REPORT, UNTIL THE OUTSTANDING BALANCE IS PAID IN FULL. SPANISH SPEAKING INTERPRETERS SHALL BE PROVIDED TO THE PLAINTIFFS & DEFENDANT TO ASSIST THEM AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE. JUDGE PRO TEM: JOANNE MADDEN. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: OEX CONTINUED ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 11/17/16. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESS-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: BENCH LETTER MAILED TO NORA CALDERON ON 12/02/16. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED-UNABLE TO FORWARD."

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JAN-12-2017 IS CONTINUED TO JAN-26-2017 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. JUDGEMENT CREDITORS JOSE LUIS REY SANCHEZ AND CONSUELO OROZCO APPEARED, ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER SHANNON RAINTREE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT RETURNED BY SHERIFF AGREEMENT TO APPEAR ATTACHED, PROOF OF SERVICE BY PERSONAL SERVICE ON 2-27-17 ATTACHED. AS TO DEFENDANT CALDERON, NORA HEARING SET FOR MAR-16-2017 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: ORDER OF EXAMINATION BENCH LETTER ISSUED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CALDERON, NORA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-26-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-26-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS WERE PRESENT, ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER DANIEL NAVARRO. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER SHANNON RAINTREE.THE INTERPRETERS' IDENTIFICATIONS HAVE BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETERS HAVE OATHS ON FILE WITH THE COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NO COSTS; IFP WAIVER GRANTED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: APR-13-2016 -- SERVICE FEE: $0.00 WAIVER AS TO DEFENDANT CALDERON, NORA

ORDER BENCH LETTER ISSUE. NO APPEARANCE BY JUDGMENT DEBTOR. CASE CONTINUED TO NOV. 17, 2016 AT 11:00AM. IF NO APPEARANCE BY JUDGMENT DEBTOR AT NOV. 17, 2016 HEARING DATE, A BENCH WARRANT WILL BE ISSUED. PER THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR, THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR IS TO PAY $700.00 EVERY TWO WEEKS UNTIL THE BALANCE IS PAID IN FULL. SPANISH SPEAKING INTERPRETERS SHALL BE PROVIDED TO ASSIST AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

BENCH LETTER ISSUED FOR JAN-26-2017; JUDGMENT DEBTOR NORA CALDERON FAILED TO APPEAR. WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ORDERED ISSUED. BAIL SET AT 500.00. JUDGMENT CREDITORS CONSUELO OROZCO AND JOSE SANCHEZ ARE PRESENT WITH SPANISH COURT INTERPRETER MANTI HENRIQUEZ. NO APPEARANCE BY THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR NORA CALDERON . NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL; CLERK; J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: ORDER OF EXAMINATION. DISCHARGED AS SETTLED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-26-2016 - JUDGMENT.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OROZCO, CONSUELO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ORDER CONTINUED TO DEC. 1, 2016 AT 11:00 FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF DEC-01-2016 IS CONTINUED TO JAN-12-2017 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. APPEARANCE BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR CONSUELO OROZCO. NO APPEARANCE BY JUDGMENT DEBTOR. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ISSUED, BAIL SET AT $500.00, AS TO DEFENDANT CALDERON, NORA

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAR-16-2017 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO APR-13-2017 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. IN OPEN COURT THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR PAID THE JUDGMENT CREDITORS $1500.00; THREE $500.00 MONEY ORDERS. THE JUDGMENT CREDITORS STATE THAT THERE IS A BALANCE OF $250.00. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR STATS THAT THE REMAINING BALANCE WAS $1500.00 AND NO FUTHER MONEY IS OWED. JUDGMENT DEBTOR TO BRING HER COPIES OF THE MONEY ORDERS TO THE NEXT SCHEDULED HEARING DATES. JUDGEMENT CREDITORS JOSE LUIS REY SANCHEZ AND CONSUELO OROZCO ARE PRESENT. ASSISTED BY MANTI HENRIQUEZ, SPANISH CERTIFIED COURT INTERPRETER. JUDGMENT DEBTOR NORA CALDERON IS PRESENT. ASSISTED BY SHANNON RAINTREE, SPANISH CERTIFIED COURT INTERPRETER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO PLAINTIFF OROZCO, CONSUELO HEARING SET FOR MAY-26-2016 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAY-26-2016 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-29-2016 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY (2) JUDGMENT CREDITORS AND JUDGMENT DEBTOR. JUDGMENT DEBTOR AGREES TO PAY 1/2 JUDGMENT ON JUN-20-2016 AND THE OTHER 1/2 ON JUL-20-2016. AUG-29-2016 FOR DISCHARGE OF THE OEX, IF PAYMENTS HAVE BEEN MADE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: L. FONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED JUDGMENT DEBTOR TO MAKE A FINAL PAYMENT OF $250.00 (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR GAVE THE JUDGMENT CREDITORS A FINAL PAYMENT OF $250.00 IN THE FORM OF A MONEY ORDER. JUDGMENT CREDITORS ACCEPT THE $250.00 AS THE FULL AND FINAL AMOUNT DUE. JUDGMENT CREDITORS TO FILE A SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT. JUDGEMENT CREDITORS JOSE LUIS REY SANCHEZ AND CONSUELO OROZCO ARE PRESENT. ASSISTED BY NINA SAFDIE, SPANISH CERTIFIED COURT INTERPRETER. JUDGMENT DEBTOR NORA CALDERON IS PRESENT. ASSISTED BY DANIEL NAVARRO, SPANISH CERTIFIED COURT INTERPRETER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
